title: China calls interference allegations ‘nonsense’ after testy Xi-Trudeau exchange - National
description: While the tense exchange between Xi and Trudeau at the G20 summit was widely covered by foreign media, there has been no coverage of it in China.
keywords: trudeau xi g20, China, China Canada interference allegations, China interference allegations, China-Canada Relations, foreign interference, Justin Trudeau, Trudeau Xi leak, Trudeau Xi meeting, Xi Confronts Trudeau, Xi Jinping, Xi Trudeau, Xi Trudeau video, Canada, Politics, World
